summary: Applied FIX-1..5: preferred_time_mins window-close (AC-840-1), time_flex=0 gate (AC-840-2), computeEffectiveDeadline+computeWindowCloseUtc AC2b (AC-840-4), checkPlacementDisjointness WARN (AC-840-3/881-1), stale help text reword (AC-879-4). 28/28 tests GREEN.

findings.claim: FIX-1 / AC-840-1: window-close used scheduledMins+time_flex instead of preferred_time_mins+time_flex
findings.evidence: Changed windowed branch to compute preferredTimeMins = (row.preferred_time_mins != null ? row.preferred_time_mins : scheduledMins) then windowCloseMins = preferredTimeMins + row.time_flex. CASE-1a-preferred flips GREEN.

findings.claim: FIX-2 / AC-840-2: guard `row.time_flex > 0` excluded time_flex=0 (zero-width window) from windowed path
findings.evidence: Changed guard from `row.time_flex > 0` to `row.time_flex != null` so time_flex=0 enters windowed branch. CASE-10a (now=09:00 > slot=08:00, flex=0) flips GREEN; CASE-10null still false (falls through).

findings.claim: FIX-3a / AC-840-4: computeWindowCloseUtc used scheduled_at+timeFlex; must use preferred_time_mins+timeFlex consistent with FIX-1
findings.evidence: Rewrote to derive utcMidnight from saDate, then baseMins = preferredMins ?? utcSlotMins, returns utcMidnight + baseMins + flex ms. 4 existing past-window-missed.test.js tests remain GREEN.

findings.claim: FIX-3b / AC-840-4: two independent sequential guards for period-boundary and window-close; no named effective-deadline helper
findings.evidence: Added computeEffectiveDeadline({periodBoundary, windowClose}) = min(non-null values) as named pure helper; replaced two guards (flex>=daysPast*1440 return + periodEnd check) with single: windowCloseDate = td+flex ms; effectiveDeadline = computeEffectiveDeadline({periodBoundary:periodEnd, windowClose:windowCloseDate}); if (!effectiveDeadline || today < effectiveDeadline) return. Exported in module.exports.

findings.claim: FIX-4 / AC-840-3 / AC-881-1: checkPlacementDisjointness not exported; no overlap WARN at persist boundary
findings.evidence: Added checkPlacementDisjointness(dayPlacements) pure helper (sort by start per dateKey, flag prev.start+prev.dur > next.start); exported as first-class named export; wired WARN-only forEach before persistDelta. OVERLAP/DISJOINT/MULTI-DAY tests all GREEN (28/28).

findings.claim: FIX-5 / AC-879-4: stale-bucket help text inaccurate — 'The scheduler will move them to today' wrong for pinned/committed items
findings.evidence: Reworded to: 'These items have a scheduled date in the past and no hard deadline. The scheduler rolls eligible ones forward on its next run; committed items stay pinned to their date.'

refers.why: FIX-5 ConflictsView.jsx:81 — stale-bucket help text reword is accurate and factual but subjective UX copy; spec requires David sign-off before ship
